title: Pages Plugins
excerpt: description: Extend Pages Functions with distributable Plugins that include built-in routing and functionality. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.
